summary: Portfolio search and write-time name resolution must push project and initiative name filters into Linear GraphQL instead of scanning every portfolio object client-side.
reason: Large Linear workspaces can make full-table project and initiative scans expensive or rate-sensitive during ordinary agent name lookups. The published CLI should keep full inventory commands available while search/resolve paths use Linear's server-side name filters where supported.
validated_outcome: Regression tests assert search and project-name write lookup queries send server-side name filters, list commands remain unfiltered and paginated for full inventory, irregular stored whitespace still survives local normalized matching, and UUID-based issue edits load the issue team before resolving `--project-name`.
